name: create_interface
short_description: Create a new I/O port interface
full_help:
create_interface

Description: 
Create a new I/O port interface

Syntax: 
create_interface  [-parent <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <name>

Returns: 
new interface object

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-parent]   Assign new interface to this parent interface
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Name for new I/O port interface

Categories: 
PinPlanning

arguments.description: Assign new interface to this parent interface
Suspend message limits during command execution
